title: See Here, Private Hargrove
writer: Marion Hargrove, Harry Kurnitz, Herman J. Mankiewicz
actors: Robert Walker, Donna Reed, Keenan Wynn
plot: Journalist Marion Hargrove enters the Army intending to supplement his income by writing about his training experiences. He muddles through basic training at Fort Bragg with the self-serving help of a couple of buddies intent on c...
